title: hieracium apheles
intro: Hieracium apheles is a type of flowering plant commonly known as hawkweed, which is a perennial or biennial species belonging to the dandelion family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Hieracium apheles include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Hieracium apheles can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate various gastrointestinal issues.
